characters.name: 며느리
characters.description: Stunningly beautiful Young Korean woman with a K-pop idol-like face, exquisite facial features, and porcelain skin. She has a natural, chubby, and curvy plus-size body with a large bust. She is wearing a fully buttoned-up collared shirt or a crew-neck sweater that covers her entire chest and neck up to the collarbone, with an oversized cardigan or jacket layered on top. Her chest area is COMPLETELY COVERED by multiple layers of fabric. NEVER low-cut, NEVER V-neck, NEVER deep neckline, NEVER off-shoulder. She looks elegant and natural.

characters.name: 시어머니
characters.description: Stern middle-aged or elderly Korean woman, sharp and cold expression, realistic wrinkles around eyes and mouth, high-end conservative luxury dress.

locations.name: 현대식 주방
locations.description: A high-end modern Korean apartment kitchen, stainless steel appliances, bright daylight.

scenes.visual_prompt: Extreme wide shot of a luxurious and modernly designed office interior in Seoul. The office is spotless and features a large window showing the cityscape. A stern middle-aged Korean woman (CHAR_02), the CEO, is sitting imposingly on a plush modern chair behind a large desk. She is wearing a high-end conservative luxury dress and has a sharp, cold expression. The lighting is bright and professional. NO TEXT, NO WRITING.

Medium shot, focusing on the upper body of the stern middle-aged Korean woman (CHAR_02), the CEO, seated behind her desk. She maintains a rigid posture, her gaze piercing. Her high-end conservative luxury dress is tailored to perfection. Her face is etched with the lines of experience and authority. The background is slightly blurred to emphasize her presence. Cinematic lighting, photorealistic 8k, NO TEXT, NO WRITING.

Close-up on the face of the stern middle-aged Korean woman (CHAR_02), the CEO. Her sharp and cold expression intensifies as she speaks, her lips barely moving. Realistic wrinkles around her eyes and mouth are visible. The lighting is dramatic, casting shadows that accentuate her features. She is wearing subtle, expensive jewelry. The background is dark and out of focus. Netflix K-Drama style, high-end cinematography, photorealistic 8k, volumetric lighting, NO TEXT, NO WRITING.

Medium shot of the stern middle-aged Korean woman (CHAR_02), the CEO, leaning forward slightly in her chair, her expression intense and unwavering. Her hands are clasped together on the desk. She's wearing a tailored, high-end conservative luxury dress. The background features modern art and minimalistic décor, typical of a high-end Seoul office. The lighting is professional and clean. Netflix K-Drama style, photorealistic 8k, volumetric lighting, NO TEXT, NO WRITING.

Extreme close-up of the stern middle-aged Korean woman's (CHAR_02) hands, tightly clasped together on the polished surface of the desk. Her knuckles are slightly white, revealing the tension she holds. She is wearing an expensive ring. The background is blurred, focusing entirely on her hands. The lighting is dramatic, highlighting the texture of her skin and the details of her jewelry. Netflix K-Drama style, photorealistic 8k, volumetric lighting, NO TEXT, NO WRITING.

Netflix K-Drama style, photorealistic 8k, volumetric lighting, NO TEXT, NO WRITING.
